backstory.original: Harbinger of mayhem and music, Brig Hellclaw causes mischief anywhere he goes.  As a member of The Sirens of the Realms, he's always on the lookout for the next place to perform.  He prefers singing over combat, but when fighting is inevitable, he's all in!  Together with his Almiraj pet Spikey, when Brig's on the loose you never know what to expect!  His trusty wand of wonder could bring a curse or a boon, but it's all in another day's work for Brig!
backstory.display: 作为破坏与音乐的使者，布格·地狱之爪走到哪里都会制造麻烦。他是海妖国度的一员，也总是在寻找着下一个理想的表演场所。相比起战斗，他更喜欢唱歌，但如果战斗无可避免，他也会全力以赴！他还有一只独角兔宠物钉钉，如果让他俩火力全开，你肯定想不到接下来会发生什么！他所信赖的奇迹魔杖能制造诅咒和奇迹，但对于布格来说，这不过又是一个平凡的工作日！

description.original: Brig leaps out and smashes a random enemy with his metallic guitar.
description.display: 布格跳出来用他的金属吉他猛击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Cranks the hype by 11, damaging and pushing enemies.
description.display: 使狂热气氛增加 11，伤害并击退敌人。

longDescription.original: Brig performs a killer solo, with flashing lights and musical notes flying everywhere, damaging and pushing enemies back with massive sound power. For the next 30 seconds, Brig's Hype stacks are increased by 11.
longDescription.display: 布格表演精彩独奏，闪烁的灯光和音符四处飞扬，用巨大的声音力量伤害并击退敌人。在接下来的 30 秒内，布格的狂热气氛增加 11。

description.desc: Brig increases the damage of everyone in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)%. For each Hype stack the buff is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively.
布格使阵型中所有人的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。每有一层“狂热气氛”堆叠，此增益额外提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%（加算），然后再以乘算叠加。

tipText.original: Brig increases the damage of all Champions in the formation
tipText.display: 布格提高阵型中所有勇士的伤害

description.pre: Brig's Hype is increased by 5 while at least one enemy has been defeated within the last 10 seconds. If no enemy has been defeated in the last 20 seconds, Brig gains 1 Hype stack each time a unique Champion attacks, up to a maximum of 10 Hype stacks.

conditions.desc: ^^Seconds Since Last Enemy Defeated: $(brig_rally_chord_seconds_since_last_kill)^Rallying Chord Hype Stacks: $(brig_rally_chord_stacks)

description.pre: 在过去的 10 秒内如果至少有 1 名敌人被击败，布格的狂热气氛将增加 5 层。如果在过去的 20 秒内没有敌人被击败，每有一位独特勇士发动攻击，布格获得 1 层狂热气氛，最多可以获得 10 层狂热气氛堆叠。

conditions.desc: ^^距离上一个敌人被击败的秒数：$(brig_rally_chord_seconds_since_last_kill)^“集结之弦”带来的狂热气氛堆叠：$(brig_rally_chord_stacks)

description.pre: Brig gains 1 Hype stack for each adjacent Champion. He gains an additional Hype stack for each adjacent Champion whose listed attack damage is higher than his.
每与一位勇士相邻，布格获得 1 层狂热气氛。如果相邻勇士所列出的攻击伤害比他高，他将额外获得 1 层狂热气氛堆叠。

conditions.desc: ^^“灵感焕发的诗人”带来的狂热气氛堆叠：$(brig_inspired_bard_stacks)

tipText.original: Brig increases his damage buff for adjacent champions who deal more damage than him
tipText.display: 布格对比他造成更多伤害的相邻勇士增加他的伤害增益

description.desc: Increases the effect of Brig's Hype by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with the Sirens of the Realms affiliation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位海妖国度的勇士，均使布格的“狂热气氛”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。

description.pre: Brig gains 2 Hype stacks for each Champion in front of him in the formation.
阵型中每有一位勇士在布格前面，布格获得 2 层狂热气氛堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Brig generates bonus hype by backing up his fellow champions
specializationDescription.display: 布格通过支持他的勇士同伴来获得额外的狂热气氛

description.pre: Brig gains 2 Hype stacks for each Champion in the formation whose listed attack damage is lower than himself.
阵型中每有一位列出的攻击伤害比布格低的勇士，他将获得 2 层狂热气氛堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Brig generates bonus hype based on how much damage he deals
specializationDescription.display: 布格会根据自己造成的伤害产生额外的狂热气氛

description.pre: Brig gains 1 Hype stack for every 5 enemies on the screen, rounded up. He gains an additional 10 Hype stacks whenever a boss enemy is on the screen.
屏幕上每有 5 名敌人，布格获得 1 层狂热气氛堆叠（四舍五入）。每当有首领在屏幕上时，他额外获得 10 层狂热气氛堆叠。

conditions.desc: ^^屏幕上的敌人数量：$(brig_critical_moment_num_monsters_on_screen)^“灵感焕发的诗人”带来的狂热气氛堆叠：$(brig_critical_moment_stacks)

description.desc: Increase the damage bonus of Hype based on the highest number of Hype stacks that Brig has ever had at once. The increase is $(not_buffed amount___2)% per Hype stack, stacking multiplicatively before applying.
根据布格曾经拥有过的最高堆叠层数来提升狂热气氛带来的伤害加成。每层狂热气氛提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，乘算后叠加。

description.original: I sold my soul to rescue you!
description.display: 我出卖了我的灵魂来救你！

description.original: If I didn't know you, this would be really suspicious.
description.display: 如果不是我认识你，那这个也太可疑了。

description.original: It's equal parts rhythm and rhyme.
description.display: 节奏和韵律是同等重要的。

description.original: You go high, I go low.
That beholder can't be there, it'll ruin the acoustics! And the venue.
description.display: 那个眼魔不能在那里，它会毁掉音乐效果！还有会场。

description.original: Imagine a stage here instead of that door, or that orc.
description.display: 想象一下这里是舞台而不是那扇门，或者那个兽人。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Harbinger of mayhem and music, Brig Hellclaw causes mischief anywhere he goes.  As a member of The Sirens of the Realms, he's always on the lookout for the next place to perform.  He prefers singing over combat, but when fighting is inevitable, he's all in!  Together with his Almiraj pet Spikey, when Brig's on the loose you never know what to expect!  His trusty wand of wonder could bring a curse or a boon, but it's all in another day's work for Brig!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Brig builds Hype to help buff his fellow Champions

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为破坏与音乐的使者，布格·地狱之爪走到哪里都会制造麻烦。他是海妖国度的一员，也总是在寻找着下一个理想的表演场所。相比起战斗，他更喜欢唱歌，但如果战斗无可避免，他也会全力以赴！他还有一只独角兔宠物钉钉，如果让他俩火力全开，你肯定想不到接下来会发生什么！他所信赖的奇迹魔杖能制造诅咒和奇迹，但对于布格来说，这不过又是一个平凡的工作日！
character_sheet_details.system_description: 布格会进入狂热气氛状态，增益他的勇士同伴
